target.name: Zipline
target.founder: Keller Rinaudo Cliffton, Keenan Wyrobek, Will Hetzler

methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series G → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.25x) to $600M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Drones & Autonomous (found 1 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 4 same-sector peers exist in Drones & Autonomous, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

private.name: Nuro
private.rationale: Same sector (Drones & Autonomous), same stage (Series G), post-money $6B

data.narrative:
Zipline is a Series G drone and autonomous delivery company that has raised $600M+ to date. The broader Drones & Autonomous sector comprises four private peers (Nuro, Joby Aviation, Archer Aviation, Elroy Air) and no public comparables. A narrow peer-median approach proved inapplicable due to insufficient same-stage or adjacent-stage datapoints within the sector.

Valuation analysis relied on stage-progression methodology, which applies a typical 1.25x step-up multiplier to the $600M raised proxy, yielding $750M. This method reflects the capital intensity and extended development cycles common to autonomous hardware ventures at later funding stages. The peer-median approach was rejected because only one same-stage peer exists and no adjacent-stage or similarly-tiered comparables met minimum threshold requirements (≥3 datapoints).

The triangulated range spans $638M (low) to $862M (high), with a median of $750M supported by the single applicable method. Key uncertainties include the absence of public market analogs, the nascent stage of commercialization across the sector, and the lack of sufficient private peer data at comparable funding stages. Any valuation within this range should be treated as illustrative pending additional comparable transactions or clearer revenue/profitability milestones.
